caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain dark background. She wears a light green, long-sleeved garment featuring small red and white floral embroidery around the neckline and a black necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her clothing. As she speaks, her facial expression remains earnest, and she uses her hands to emphasize her points. Her right hand moves from a resting position to a gesturing motion, eventually pointing her index finger forward to stress a point. A small circular logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene. The lighting is consistent throughout, focusing on the woman while the background remains deep black. The progression shows her active communication through a combination of verbal delivery and rhythmic hand gestures.
